name: registration-toggle
description: REGISTRATION_ENABLED config setting (defaults false, explicit opt-in)

name: redis-rate-limit-storage
description: Rate limit state stored in Redis with sliding window

name: 429-retry-after
description: Return 429 Too Many Requests with Retry-After header

name: x-forwarded-for-safety
description: Only trust X-Forwarded-For behind trusted proxy (config toggle)

name: oauth-registration-block
description: Block OAuth registration when REGISTRATION_ENABLED is false

name: oauth-link-before-email
description: Look up OAuth link before email match in _find_or_create_user

name: case-insensitive-email-lookup
description: Use func.lower() for case-insensitive email matching in OAuth flow

name: rate-limiter-tests
description: Unit tests for rate limiter with environment isolation

name: router-rate-limit-tests
description: Tests verifying rate limits wired correctly into auth endpoints
